en: And as they were speaking to the people, the priests and the captain of the temple and the Sadducees came upon them,
zh: 使徒們正對群眾講話的時候，祭司、聖殿的守衛長，和撒都該人來到他們那裡。

en: greatly annoyed because they were teaching the people and proclaiming in Jesus the resurrection from the dead.
zh: 因為使徒教訓群眾，並且傳揚耶穌從死人中復活，他們就非常惱怒，

en: And they arrested them and put them in custody until the next day, for it was already evening.
zh: 於是下手拿住使徒。那時天已經晚了，就把他們拘留到第二天。

en: But many of those who had heard the word believed, and the number of the men came to about five thousand.
zh: 然而有許多聽道的人信了，男人的數目，約有五千。

en: On the next day their rulers and elders and scribes gathered together in Jerusalem,
zh: 第二天，猶太人的官長、長老、經學家，都聚集在耶路撒冷，

en: with Annas the high priest and Caiaphas and John and Alexander, and all who were of the high-priestly family.
zh: 還有大祭司亞那和該亞法、約翰、亞歷山大，以及大祭司的家人，所有的人都在那裡。

en: And when they had set them in the midst, they inquired, "By what power or by what name did you do this?"
zh: 他們叫使徒都站在當中，查問說：“你們憑甚麼能力，奉誰的名作這事？”

en: Then Peter, filled with the Holy Spirit, said to them, "Rulers of the people and elders,
zh: 當時彼得被聖靈充滿，對他們說：“民眾的領袖和長老啊！

en: if we are being examined today concerning a good deed done to a crippled man, by what means this man has been healed,
zh: 我們今天受審，如果是為了在那殘疾人身上所行的善事，就是這個人怎麼會好的，

en: let it be known to all of you and to all the people of Israel that by the name of Jesus Christ of Nazareth, whom you crucified, whom God raised from the dead- by him this man is standing before you well.
zh: 那麼，你們各位和以色列全民都應當知道，站在你們面前這人好了，是因拿撒勒人耶穌基督的名。這位耶穌基督，你們把他釘死在十字架上， 神卻使他從死人中復活。

en: This Jesus is the stone that was rejected by you, the builders, which has become the cornerstone.
zh: 這耶穌是你們 ‘建築工人所棄的石頭， 成了房角的主要石頭。’

en: And there is salvation in no one else, for there is no other name under heaven given among men by which we must be saved."
zh: 除了他以外，別無拯救，因為在天下人間，沒有賜下別的名，我們可以靠著得救。”

en: Now when they saw the boldness of Peter and John, and perceived that they were uneducated, common men, they were astonished. And they recognized that they had been with Jesus.
zh: 他們看見彼得和約翰的膽量，也知道這兩個人是沒有學問的平民，就很驚奇；同時認出他們是跟耶穌一夥的，

en: But seeing the man who was healed standing beside them, they had nothing to say in opposition.
zh: 又看見那醫好了的人，和他們一同站著，就沒有話可辯駁。

en: But when they had commanded them to leave the council, they conferred with one another,
zh: 於是吩咐他們到公議會外面去，彼此商議，

en: saying, "What shall we do with these men? For that a notable sign has been performed through them is evident to all the inhabitants of Jerusalem, and we cannot deny it.
zh: 說：“對這些人我們應該怎麼辦呢？因為有一件人所共知的神蹟，藉著他們行了出來，所有住在耶路撒冷的人都知道，我們也無法否認。

en: But in order that it may spread no further among the people, let us warn them to speak no more to anyone in this name."
zh: 為了避免這件事在民間越傳越廣，我們應該警告他們，不許再奉這名向任何人談道。”

en: So they called them and charged them not to speak or teach at all in the name of Jesus.
zh: 於是叫了他們來，嚴禁他們再奉耶穌的名講論教導。

en: But Peter and John answered them, "Whether it is right in the sight of God to listen to you rather than to God, you must judge,
zh: 彼得和約翰回答：“聽從你們過於聽從 神，在 神面前對不對，你們自己說吧！

en: for we cannot but speak of what we have seen and heard."
zh: 我們看見的聽見的，不能不說！”

en: And when they had further threatened them, they let them go, finding no way to punish them, because of the people, for all were praising God for what had happened.
zh: 眾人因著所發生的事，都頌讚 神，於是公議會為了群眾的緣故，也因為找不到藉口懲罰他們，就恐嚇一番，把他們放了。

en: For the man on whom this sign of healing was performed was more than forty years old.
zh: 原來藉著神蹟醫好的那人，有四十多歲了。

en: When they were released, they went to their friends and reported what the chief priests and the elders had said to them.
zh: 彼得和約翰被釋放了之後，回到自己的人那裡去，把祭司長和長老說的一切，都告訴他們。

en: And when they heard it, they lifted their voices together to God and said, "Sovereign Lord, who made the heaven and the earth and the sea and everything in them,
zh: 他們聽了，就同心向 神高聲說：“主啊，你是那創造天地、海洋和其中萬物的主宰。

en: who through the mouth of our father David, your servant, said by the Holy Spirit, "' Why did the Gentiles rage, and the peoples plot in vain?
zh: 你曾以聖靈藉著你僕人我們祖先大衛的口說： ‘列國為甚麼騷動？ 萬民為甚麼空謀妄想？

en: The kings of the earth set themselves, and the rulers were gathered together, against the Lord and against his Anointed'-
zh: 地上的君王都起來， 首領聚在一起， 敵對主和他的受膏者。’

en: for truly in this city there were gathered together against your holy servant Jesus, whom you anointed, both Herod and Pontius Pilate, along with the Gentiles and the peoples of Israel,
zh: 希律和本丟．彼拉多，外族人和以色列民，真的在這城裡聚集，反對你所膏立的聖僕耶穌，

en: to do whatever your hand and your plan had predestined to take place.
zh: 行了你手和你旨意所預定要成就的一切。

en: And now, Lord, look upon their threats and grant to your servants to continue to speak your word with all boldness,
zh: 主啊，他們恐嚇我們，現在求你鑒察，也賜你僕人們大有膽量，傳講你的道。

en: while you stretch out your hand to heal, and signs and wonders are performed through the name of your holy servant Jesus."
zh: 求你伸手醫治，藉著你聖僕耶穌的名，大行神蹟奇事。”

en: And when they had prayed, the place in which they were gathered together was shaken, and they were all filled with the Holy Spirit and continued to speak the word of God with boldness.
zh: 他們禱告完了，聚會的地方震動起來，他們都被聖靈充滿，放膽傳講 神的道。

en: Now the full number of those who believed were of one heart and soul, and no one said that any of the things that belonged to him was his own, but they had everything in common.
zh: 全體信徒一心一意，沒有一個人說自己的財物是自己的，他們凡物公用。

en: And with great power the apostles were giving their testimony to the resurrection of the Lord Jesus, and great grace was upon them all.
zh: 使徒大有能力，為主耶穌的復活作見證，眾人都蒙了大恩。

en: There was not a needy person among them, for as many as were owners of lands or houses sold them and brought the proceeds of what was sold
zh: 他們中間沒有一個有缺乏的，因為凡有田產房屋的都賣了，把得到的錢拿來，

en: and laid it at the apostles' feet, and it was distributed to each as any had need.
zh: 放在使徒腳前，照著各人的需要來分配。

en: Thus Joseph, who was also called by the apostles Barnabas (which means son of encouragement), a Levite, a native of Cyprus,
zh: 有一個人名叫約瑟，使徒稱他為巴拿巴，就是“安慰者”的意思，他是個利未人，生在塞浦路斯。

en: sold a field that belonged to him and brought the money and laid it at the apostles' feet.
zh: 他賣掉了自己的田地，把錢拿來，放在使徒的腳前。
